free_text: The 3.2 MV PELLETRON accelerator of the
Research Laboratory For Nuclear Reactors at the Tokyo
Lithium target bombarded by 1.5 ns bunch
proton beam. For neutron energies 10-90 keV proton
energy is 1.903 MeV (22 keV above threshold energy of
P-LI7 reaction), pulse repetition rate 2 MHz, average
proton current 5 micro-a. For 550 keV neutron energy
proton energy is 2.3 MeV,pulse repetition rate 4 MHz,
.Broad neutron spectrum with maximum at aprx 35 and
detector 15.2 cm diameter by 20.3 cm was centered
in a 33.0 cm outer diameter by 35.6 cm NaI(TL) hollow
energy resolution is 7% at 0.662 MeV and time resolu-
tion is 4.0 ns for 0.511 MeV gamma
Li-6 glass detector for neutron flux monito-
ring. 5 mm diameter * 5 mm length 6-Li detetor was
used for 10-90 keV region, and 102 mm diameter *
6.4 mm length detector was used for 550 keV
.Gold sample for monitor, metallic, chemical purity
total error composed of partial ones given
Max error of the response function
Error due to the trial function
Resultant error due to weighting function
Error due to the extrapolation of gamma
Max error of the multiplicity of observed
.Corrections were made for neutron self-shielding and
multiple scattering in the sample, for gamma-ray
absorption and scatteing in sample, for neutron cross-
three for  CS at 550 keV  added - SM
